firm.name: M&A TOP Partner
firm.oneLiner: Praxisbewährte M&A Beratung in Sachen Unternehmensnachfolge, Unternehmensverkauf und Unternehmenskauf für mittelständische Unternehmen.
fitNotes: Clear fit for a deal platform because they run sell-side and buy-side M&A, including documentation, contacts, offers, negotiations, and due diligence.
They explicitly produce an Exposé or Informationsmemorandum, which suggests document-heavy workflows that could benefit from a structured deal room.
They emphasize exclusive mandates and close collaboration, so tooling that keeps buyers, documents, and approvals organized could be relevant.
No client portal or data room is stated on the site, so current workflow appears relationship and process driven rather than platform driven.

people.name: Mag. lic.oec. Christian Imboden

footprint.title: Impressum role listing
footprint.summary: Named as Geschäftsführer and Gesellschafter of M&A TOP Partner.

footprint.title: Website quote
footprint.summary: Described as the firm's contact person and managing director on the home page.

likelyPriorities: Inference: preserving confidentiality and controlled information sharing during transactions.
Inference: efficient buyer and investor communication across the deal process.
Inference: maintaining a hands-on advisory model with clear mandate control.

signals.title: Published article, Das ewige Unternehmen
signals.detail: Long-form content on linking start-ups and stop-downs through networks and succession.

signals.title: Published article, Unternehmensdarstellung Exposé Informationsmemorandum
signals.detail: Explains how the firm prepares an Exposé or Informationsmemorandum and uses it in the sales process.

signals.title: Website states hundreds of completed transactions
signals.detail: The home page says the firm has already successfully handled hundreds of transactions.

play.angle: Lead with their clearly process-heavy, confidentiality-sensitive way of running sales, especially the fact that they hand out the Exposé only after a signed NDA and use it as the core buyer document. That makes Fintalo relevant as a way to keep NDA workflows, staged document release, and buyer communication in one controlled place, without adding another messy tool layer. Avoid sounding like a generic CRM pitch or talking about broad AI automation first, since a hands-on boutique will care more about control, speed, and clean process than novelty.

objections.objection: We already manage this well with email and documents.
objections.counter: That is exactly the workflow Fintalo is meant to tighten, it keeps the same process but reduces back-and-forth, version confusion, and manual follow-up around NDAs and document release.

objections.objection: We are a small, hands-on advisory firm, so a platform may be too much.
objections.counter: Fintalo is useful precisely for small teams that want more control without extra admin, because it centralizes the deal flow instead of adding another system to maintain.

objections.objection: Confidentiality is critical, and we cannot risk exposing buyer data.
objections.counter: Understood, and that is why the pitch should focus on permissioned access, stage-gated release, and tracked sharing rather than open collaboration.

openingEmail.subject: A quick idea for your NDA and Exposé workflow
openingEmail.body:
Hi Christian,

I noticed you hand out the Exposé only after a signed confidentiality agreement, which is a very controlled way to run a process. Fintalo helps M&A advisors keep that same discipline in one place, with NDA workflows, stage-gated document release, and buyer communication instead of scattered email threads.

Would you be open to a short demo to see if it could save you time on the next mandate?

Best,
openingEmail.groundedFact: You hand out the Exposé only after a signed confidentiality agreement.

cities, only Graz and Hitzendorf bei Graz were stated, no separate office list found.
people, only one senior decision-maker was clearly named on the provided pages.
tech_signals.mentions_data_room, no explicit data room, Datenraum, or VDR mention found.
tech_signals.has_client_portal, no client login or portal found.
why-now signals, no dated mandate, hire, award, or office move found beyond dated content pages.
process_email_based: the site describes hands-on advisory but never names email, Excel or spreadsheets as the deal-management tool; not counted as an email-based process.
